title: Device Settings - All settings can be changed
scenario: Verify all non-toggle settings in Device Settings can be changed and display updated values correctly
steps: 1. Pair the headset with the phone and launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. From the Home screen, tap on the connected [Device Name] to open Device Settings.
3. Tap any non-toggle option (e.g., Language, Sidetone, or other picker-based settings).
4. Verify that a picker dialog displays listing all available values for that option.
5. Select any value from the picker.
6. Confirm that the picker closes and the selected option updates to show the new value on the Device Settings screen.
7. Repeat steps 3–6 for every non-toggle option available for the device.
expected: All non-toggle settings can be changed via a picker. After selecting a value, the picker closes and the Device Settings screen reflects the updated value for each option.
